response.justification: Bogdan has strong full-stack engineering experience, extensive cloud and AI-agent exposure at re:cinq, and demonstrable leadership in open-source and technical mentoring — aligning well with the role’s technical and consulting demands — but lacks explicit evidence of 8+ years focused on production-grade GenAI systems, vector databases, RAG architectures, or direct enterprise AI deployment, which are core to the position.
strengths: Proven experience with AI-agent infrastructure and MCP frameworks at re:cinq
Strong cloud and full-stack delivery track record (AWS, Docker, Kubernetes)
Demonstrated technical leadership through mentoring, workshops, and open-source projects
concerns: No clear evidence of 8+ years dedicated to GenAI or production AI systems
Missing explicit experience with vector databases or RAG architecture implementation
Limited documentation of enterprise customer-facing technical discovery or AI QA pipelines
